'''Ruillia's Insulated Rooms''' was the name of a small hostelry located between [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] and the [[Lucky Despot]] Hotel & Casino in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
